title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
